reboot.note: Reboot verified: 392/392 green, pkg_hash s6-c4a9e7 matched.

plan.note: Plan: aggregateChapterHealth(macroVerdict, priorChapterHealth, profile) -> ChapterHealthReport in ChapterHealth.ts. Re-verified MacroVerdict/CriterionResult shape before coding (zero-assumption).

anchor.note: Anchor + ledger: dm-0051 covers the structural pass-count score (no calibration needed -- it's a fact of MacroVerdict's own shape), the new trendFlatTolerance profile field, and ChapterHealth deliberately never computing alerts (needs cross-chapter EMA baseline only CampaignDirector has). Ledgered BEFORE implementation.

implement.note: Implemented ChapterHealth.ts (aggregateChapterHealth + chapterScore + computeTrend). Added CampaignProfile.chapterHealthCalibration.trendFlatTolerance (parse+default+rejection). No TODOs/stubs.

verify.note: npm test: 404/404 green (392 baseline + 12 new: 11 ChapterHealth tests incl. score-formula boundary cases, trend flat/rising/falling, alerts-always-empty, two-profile tolerance externalization proof; 1 CampaignProfile rejection test). npx tsc --noEmit clean. npm run build clean.

integrate.note: PKG: +1 node (eval/campaign/chapter_health), edges both directions into eval/macro/curriculum, eval/campaign/campaign_profile, eval/campaign/campaign_state. pkg_hash s6-c4a9e7 -> s6-d1f68b.

report.note: task_slices.md S6.4 -> COMPLETED. No requirements_backlog.md state change needed -- REQ-142 already IN_PROGRESS from P4; flips VERIFIED at S6.6.

handoff.note: Handoff written: pkg_hash s6-d1f68b, next focus S6.5 CampaignDirector, four open design questions flagged for zero-assumption resolution before code.

acceptance.criterion: S6.4 delivers the remaining REQ-142 P6 share: the four macro criteria are elevated from a per-chapter MacroVerdict (P4, one-shot) to a running CampaignState.chapterHealth trajectory with score+trend, consuming MacroVerdict as data (dm-0046) and never re-deriving it. REQ-142 stays IN_PROGRESS -- flips at S6.6 once S6.5's CampaignDirector actually threads ChapterHealth into the fold.
